case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. SERGIO ROLANDO QUINTAL MOO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINTAL MOO, SERGIO ROLANDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTAL MOO, SERGIO ROLANDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED SEP-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTAL MOO, SERGIO ROLANDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-20-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR ORTIZ--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTAL MOO, SERGIO ROLANDO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR ORTIZ--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
